signals.label: setup_complexity
signals.quoteText: Setup took three days before the team could begin.

signals.label: slow_service
signals.quoteText: The service was painfully slow during our evening visit.

signals.label: support_delay
signals.quoteText: Support never replied even after two follow-up messages.

signals.label: reliability
signals.quoteText: It crashes every morning and interrupts our daily work.

signals.label: unclear_documentation
signals.quoteText: The instructions sent me in circles when I tried the first setup.

signals.label: price_too_high
signals.quoteText: The final bill felt much too high for what was delivered.

signals.label: waiting_time
signals.quoteText: We waited almost an hour before anyone took our order.

signals.label: feeling_ignored
signals.quoteText: The staff made us feel unwelcome despite the quiet room.

signals.label: delivery_delay
signals.quoteText: Delivery arrived four days late and the event had already passed.

signals.label: usability
signals.quoteText: The dashboard is confusing to navigate for new team members.

signals.label: data_reliability
signals.quoteText: Our saved settings disappeared twice after routine updates.

signals.label: booking_friction
signals.quoteText: Booking by phone was impossible because the line kept dropping.

signals.label: cleanliness
signals.quoteText: The room was not properly cleaned when we checked in.

signals.label: easy_setup
signals.quoteText: I need setup to take minutes so a small team can start immediately.

signals.label: on_time_delivery
signals.quoteText: We want service that arrives on time without repeated status calls.

signals.label: quick_support
signals.quoteText: I want support to answer the same day when a client project is blocked.

signals.label: reliable_tool
signals.quoteText: We need a tool that works every morning without an engineer watching it.

signals.label: clear_documentation
signals.quoteText: I want instructions I can follow once and then work independently.

signals.label: peace_of_mind
signals.quoteText: We are looking for peace of mind during our busiest season.

signals.label: wait_time_visibility
signals.quoteText: I want a clear wait-time estimate before deciding whether to stay.

signals.label: location_consistency
signals.quoteText: consistent service at every branch

signals.label: transparent_pricing
signals.quoteText: pricing that is easy to understand before entering payment details

signals.label: team_adoption
signals.quoteText: whole team to adopt it without weeks of training

signals.label: effective_support
signals.quoteText: reply that solves the issue rather than another generic template

signals.label: on_time_delivery
signals.quoteText: delivery before the promised date

signals.label: welcoming_experience
signals.quoteText: first visit to feel welcoming from arrival through checkout

signals.label: price_too_high
signals.quoteText: annual price is hard to justify

signals.label: niche_fit
signals.quoteText: not sure it fits our niche

signals.label: migration_risk
signals.quoteText: Moving all our records feels risky

signals.label: learning_curve
signals.quoteText: learning curve may be too steep

signals.label: contract_commitment
signals.quoteText: A twelve-month contract feels restrictive

signals.label: data_security
signals.quoteText: I worry about where customer data is stored and who can access it.

signals.label: social_proof
signals.quoteText: There are too few recent reviews for me to trust the advertised results.

signals.label: plan_clarity
signals.quoteText: I cannot tell what the base plan includes compared with the upgrades.

signals.label: integration_fit
signals.quoteText: It may not integrate with our current tools

signals.label: vendor_capacity
signals.quoteText: I am unsure the small team can support us if our usage grows quickly.

signals.label: cancellation_friction
signals.quoteText: The cancellation process looks complicated

signals.label: multi_location_proof
signals.quoteText: I need proof it works across locations

signals.label: frustration
signals.quoteText: I felt completely frustrated after repeating the same setup four times.

signals.label: relief
signals.quoteText: I was relieved when it finally worked without another support call.

signals.quoteText: I still feel doubtful

signals.quoteText: I feel confident

signals.quoteText: deeply disappointed

signals.quoteText: I am hopeful
